channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/4/11)
channel.description: 嘿，今天的信息流里关于 AI 和编程的内容特别多，尤其是围绕 **AI Agent（智能体）** 和 **编码（Coding）** 的。我发现几个挺有意思的趋势：一是“技能蒸馏”和“Agent技能市场”概念很火，大家都在想办法把人的思维模式或者特定能力“封装”给AI用；二是关于 **Claude Code** 和 **Codex** 这类编码AI的讨论、工具和“破解”特别多，看来开发者们都在积极拥抱AI编程助手；三是本地运行和量化大模型（Local LLM）的评测和工具更新很快，追求性价比和可控性。下面我给你挑了几件最值得你花时间了解的事。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 嘿，今天的信息流里关于 AI 和编程的内容特别多，尤其是围绕 **AI Agent（智能体）** 和 **编码（Coding）** 的。我发现几个挺有意思的趋势：一是“技能蒸馏”和“Agent技能市场”概念很火，大家都在想办法把人的思维模式或者特定能力“封装”给AI用；二是关于 **Claude Code** 和 **Codex** 这类编码AI的讨论、工具和“破解”特别多，看来开发者们都在积极拥抱AI编程助手；三是本地运行和量化大模型（Local LLM）的评测和工具更新很快，追求性价比和可控性。下面我给你挑了几件最值得你花时间了解的事。

item.title: milla-jovovich/mempalace
item.description: The highest-scoring AI memory system ever benchmarked. And it's free. | 近期热门 | 总 40245 stars
item.author: milla-jovovich

item.title: alchaincyf/nuwa-skill
item.description: 你想蒸馏的下一个员工，何必是同事。蒸馏任何人的思维方式——心智模型、决策启发式、表达DNA。Distill how anyone thinks. | 近期热门 | 总 6706 stars
item.author: alchaincyf

item.title: xixu-me/awesome-persona-distill-skills
item.description: 同事.skill, 女娲.skill, 前任.skill… Curated list of Agent Skills centered on people, relationships, commemorative scenes, and methodological perspectives | 近期热门 | 总 2894 stars
item.author: xixu-me

item.title: garrytan/gbrain
item.description: Garry's Opinionated OpenClaw/Hermes Agent Brain | 近期热门 | 总 2803 stars
item.author: garrytan

item.title: nashsu/llm_wiki
item.description: LLM Wiki is a cross-platform desktop application that turns your documents into an organized, interlinked knowledge base — automatically. Instead of traditional RAG (retrieve-and-answer from scratch every time), the LLM incrementally builds and maintains a persistent wiki from your sources。 | 近期热门 | 总 597 stars
item.author: nashsu

item.title: QLHazyCoder/codex-oauth-automation-extension
item.description: Chrome扩展：支持OpenAI OAuth注册、验证码获取、CPA回调验证与自动恢复 | 近期热门 | 总 370 stars
item.author: QLHazyCoder

item.title: bitjaru/styleseed
item.description: Design engine that makes AI code like a UI/UX designer. Pick any brand skin, get professional UI. | 近期热门 | 总 144 stars
item.author: bitjaru

item.title: MarchLiu/hypatia
item.description: "We can wander through the stacks of the Library of Alexandria, imagining the scrolls and the knowledge they contain. Its destruction is a warning: all we have is transient.”--Alberto Manguel | 近期热门 | 总 121 stars
item.author: MarchLiu

item.title: hang-in/seCall
item.description: recall your second brain | 近期热门 | 总 115 stars
item.author: hang-in

item.title: remoteoss/dexter
item.description: A fast, full-featured Elixir LSP optimized for large codebases. | 近期热门 | 总 59 stars
item.author: remoteoss
